# TP-Link Smart Home

`tplink_smarthome` is a library to communicate with your TP-Link smart devices in a user friendly way.

# Installation

```bash
$ pip install python-tplink-smarthome
```

# Author

- Jeffrey Muller \<<mailto:jeffrey.muller92@gmail.com>>

classes.name: tplink_smarthome.plug.TPLinkSmartPlug

methods.name: tplink_smarthome.plug.TPLinkSmartPlug.info
documentation: Get information about a smart plug.
An object to represent a physical smart plug.

classes.name: tplink_smarthome.device.TPLinkSmartDevice

methods.name: tplink_smarthome.device.TPLinkSmartDevice.__init__
documentation:
Initialize a new smart device object.

```
param host

 host to connect to.

param port

 port to connect to (default: 9999).

param connect

 whether you want to connect to the plug on
instantiation of the class.
```

methods.name: tplink_smarthome.device.TPLinkSmartDevice.socket
documentation:
Return the socket used to connect to the device.

Use this property with caution.

methods.name: tplink_smarthome.device.TPLinkSmartDevice.connect
documentation: Establish a connection to the smart device.

methods.name: tplink_smarthome.device.TPLinkSmartDevice.close
documentation: Close the connection to the smart device.

methods.name: tplink_smarthome.device.TPLinkSmartDevice.send
documentation:
Send a command to the smart device.

```
param command

 or  containing the command to send.
```

methods.name: tplink_smarthome.device.TPLinkSmartDevice.recv
documentation: Wait for data coming from the smart device.

An object to represent any TP-Link smart device.

You may not have to instantiate that object directly.

functions.name: tplink_smarthome.protocol.encrypt
documentation:
Encrypt a message in TP-Link protocol.

```
param message

 message to encrypt.
```

functions.name: tplink_smarthome.protocol.decrypt
documentation:
Decrypt a message in TP-Link protocol.

```
param message

 message to decrypt.
```
